title: Software Engineer
description: Software Engineers design, develop, test, and maintain software applications. The role requires strong programming, logical thinking, and problem-solving skills.

title: Data Scientist
description: Data Scientists analyze large datasets to extract insights using statistics, machine learning, and programming. They work with data visualization and predictive models.

title: Graphic Designer
description: Graphic Designers create visual concepts using design tools to communicate ideas. Creativity and visual thinking are essential for this role.

title: Mechanical Engineer
description: Mechanical Engineers design and manufacture mechanical systems and machines. The role involves physics, mechanics, and material science.
